presets.name: lab
presets.summary: Writing + projects on the home page; docs and pages off (default for tidypress init).

presets.name: blog
presets.summary: Writing-only personal blog; docs, projects, and pages off.

presets.name: persona
presets.summary: Hero block, projects, writing, and an about page for CV or portfolio sites.

presets.name: docs-writing
presets.summary: Docs manual plus writing; writing appears before docs on the home page.

presets.name: body-of-work

presets.name: body-of-work-docs
presets.summary: Same as body-of-work with product docs enabled and seeded.

presets.name: custom
presets.summary: Docs, writing, and a sample playbooks content collection.
